skill_availability_goal: Verify missing Kubernetes/Helm evidence blocks only that class without placeholder commands while confirmed Development and Docker scope continues.
prompt: 按 `backfill-handoff.md` 的已确认 existing-system backfill 批次处理部署文档。fixture 有 Development 与 Docker 的完整配置和执行证据，但只有一份未执行的 Kubernetes 计划，没有 Chart、values、模板、kubeconfig 权限或验证结果。请分类报告并只写已确认范围。
